attach-zugferd-xml-to-pdf.title: Attach ZUGFeRD XML to PDF and Convert to PDF/A‑3B
attach-zugferd-xml-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, embed a ZUGFeRD XML invoice as an attached file, convert the document to PDF/A‑3B compliance, and save the resulting file.

create-zugferd-compliant-invoice-pdf.title: Create ZUGFeRD‑Compliant Invoice PDF with Embedded XML
create-zugferd-compliant-invoice-pdf.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF invoice, adding readable text, embedding ZUGFeRD XML data as an attachment, and saving the result using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-zugfe-rd-pdf.title: Validate ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf
validate-zugfe-rd-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF document and validate its ZUGFeRD data against the ZUGFeRD specification, outputting a validation log.

extract-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.title: Extract ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate the embedded ZUGFeRD XML attachment, and save it as a separate file.

update-zugferd-xml-attachment.title: Update ZUGFeRD XML Attachment in PDF
update-zugferd-xml-attachment.description: Demonstrates replacing the embedded ZUGFeRD XML file in a PDF/A‑3 document using Aspose.Pdf's BindXml method.

remove-zugferd-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove ZUGFeRD Attachment from PDF
remove-zugferd-attachment-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate a ZUGFeRD XML attachment, delete it, and save the modified document while preserving all other content.

add-custom-metadata-to-zugferd-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata to ZUGFeRD PDF
add-custom-metadata-to-zugferd-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing ZUGFeRD PDF with Aspose.Pdf, add custom metadata entries such as ProjectCode and Department, and save the updated document.

encrypt-zugferd-pdf-with-passwords.title: Encrypt ZUGFeRD PDF with User and Owner Passwords
encrypt-zugferd-pdf-with-passwords.description: Shows how to load a ZUGFeRD PDF, set user and owner passwords with specific permissions, and save the encrypted file using Aspose.Pdf.

digitally-sign-zugferd-pdf-with-timestam.title: Digitally Sign ZUGFeRD PDF with Timestamp
digitally-sign-zugferd-pdf-with-timestam.description: Demonstrates loading a ZUGFeRD PDF, adding a signature field, applying a PKCS#7 digital signature from a PFX certificate, and attaching a timestamp from a TSA server, then saving the signed document.

add-expiry-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Expiry JavaScript to PDF
add-expiry-javascript-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a document‑level JavaScript action that checks an expiry date and automatically closes the PDF when it is opened after that date.

add-js-open-action-jump-to-page-10.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Jump to Page 10
add-js-open-action-jump-to-page-10.description: Demonstrates how to assign a JavaScript open action to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so that the document automatically navigates to page 10 when opened.

add-page-level-javascript-alert-to-pdf.title: Add Page-Level JavaScript Alert to PDF
add-page-level-javascript-alert-to-pdf.description: Shows how to attach a page‑level JavaScript action that displays an alert when a specific PDF page is opened, using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-order-form-with-calculated-to.title: Create PDF Order Form with Calculated Total Field
create-pdf-order-form-with-calculated-to.description: Shows how to add text box form fields to a PDF and attach JavaScript that calculates a total amount from quantity and price fields using Aspose.Pdf.

add-document-level-auto-save-javascript.title: Add Document-Level Auto‑Save JavaScript to PDF
add-document-level-auto-save-javascript.description: Demonstrates embedding a document‑level JavaScript action that automatically saves the PDF at regular intervals using Aspose.Pdf.

draw-star-shape-with-pdf-operators.title: Draw a Star Shape with Low-Level PDF Operators
draw-star-shape-with-pdf-operators.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf low-level PDF operators to draw a custom 5‑pointed star at specified coordinates, applying stroke and fill colors.

modify-pdf-line-width-operator.title: Modify PDF Line Width Operators from 1 to 3 Points
modify-pdf-line-width-operator.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page's content operators, finds SetLineWidth operators with a width of 1 point, and changes them to 3 points before saving the document.

remove-background-graphics-operators.title: Remove Background Graphics Operators from PDF
remove-background-graphics-operators.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, identify operators that draw background graphics (XObject draws and fill/stroke path operators), and delete them from the content stream before saving the cleaned document.

replace-text-using-showtext-operators.title: Replace Text in PDF Using ShowText Operators
replace-text-using-showtext-operators.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate ShowText (Tj) operators, replace a specific string, and save the modified document.

create-bar-chart-pdf-custom-colors.title: Create Bar Chart PDF with Custom Colors and Axis Labels
create-bar-chart-pdf-custom-colors.description: This example demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a bar chart using Aspose.Pdf's Graph API, applying custom bar colors and adding X‑ and Y‑axis labels.

create-line-graph-multiple-stroke-styles.title: Create Line Graph with Multiple Stroke Styles in PDF
create-line-graph-multiple-stroke-styles.description: Demonstrates how to draw a line graph with three data series, each using a different stroke style (solid, dashed, dotted) in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-vector-graph-in-pdf.title: Embed Vector Graph in PDF
embed-vector-graph-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a Graph container, adding vector shapes (rectangle, ellipse, line) with styling, and embedding the vector graphic directly into a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

combine-multiple-graphs-on-single-pdf-pa.title: Combine Multiple Graphs on a Single PDF Page
combine-multiple-graphs-on-single-pdf-pa.description: Demonstrates how to place four Aspose.Pdf Graph objects on one PDF page in a 2×2 grid layout, calculating positions based on page dimensions.

generate-invoice-pdfs-with-sales-graph.title: Generate Invoice PDFs with Sales Graph
generate-invoice-pdfs-with-sales-graph.description: Shows how to load a PDF template, populate invoice fields, and draw a simple line chart of monthly sales using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment Annotation to PDF
add-file-attachment-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to attach an external PDF file to a PDF document as a file attachment annotation, including setting a description and MIME type.

attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.title: Attach Multiple Files to PDF with Custom Descriptions
attach-multiple-files-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding several file attachment annotations to a PDF, each with its own MIME type information and description, and saving the updated document.

list-pdf-attachments-names-sizes.title: List PDF Attachments with Names and Sizes
list-pdf-attachments-names-sizes.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages and annotations, locate file attachment annotations, and output each attachment's original name and size in bytes.

remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.title: Remove Specific Attachment from PDF
remove-specific-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete a named attachment from a PDF while keeping all other attachments using Aspose.Pdf.

update-pdf-attachment-description.title: Update PDF File Attachment Description
update-pdf-attachment-description.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate file attachment annotations, modify the attached file's description, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-title-author-invoice-number.title: Set PDF Title, Author, and Custom Invoice Number Property
set-pdf-title-author-invoice-number.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set standard metadata fields such as Title and Author, add a custom property for the invoice number, and save the updated document.

read-custom-pdf-metadata-log-audit.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata and Log for Auditing
read-custom-pdf-metadata-log-audit.description: The example loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracts non‑predefined metadata entries, and writes them to a text file for audit purposes.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-passwords.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Passwords
encrypt-pdf-aes256-passwords.description: Demonstrates how to apply AES‑256 encryption to a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf, specifying both user and owner passwords and setting basic permissions.

set-pdf-permissions-allow-printing-only.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Printing Only
set-pdf-permissions-allow-printing-only.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, permitting only printing while disabling content copying and annotation changes.

digitally-sign-pdf-with-pfx-timestamp.title: Digitally Sign PDF with PFX Certificate and Timestamp
digitally-sign-pdf-with-pfx-timestamp.description: Shows how to add a signature field to a PDF, apply a PKCS#7 digital signature using a PFX certificate, include a timestamp, and save the signed document.

verify-pdf-digital-signature.title: Verify PDF Digital Signature and Retrieve Signer Details
verify-pdf-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to detect compromised signatures, verify each digital signature in a PDF, and extract signer information using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-docx-layout.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-layout.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file and save it as a DOCX document while preserving the original layout, fonts, and tables using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-html-embedded-images.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Images
convert-pdf-to-html-embedded-images.description: Shows how to convert a PDF into a single HTML file with all resources, including images, embedded as Base64 data URIs.

convert-pdf-page-to-high-resolution-png.title: Convert PDF Page to High-Resolution PNG
convert-pdf-page-to-high-resolution-png.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, select the first page, and export it as a 300 DPI PNG image.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images
batch-convert-pdfs-to-jpeg.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all PDF files in a folder, convert each page to a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images with names derived from the source files.

export-selected-pdf-pages.title: Export Selected PDF Pages to Separate Files
export-selected-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to extract specific pages from a PDF and save each as an individual PDF file while preserving the original page size and orientation.

merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.title: Merge PDFs While Preserving Bookmarks
merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.description: Shows how to combine multiple PDF files into a single document while retaining the original bookmarks and outline hierarchy using Aspose.Pdf.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Page Files
split-pdf-into-individual-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its pages, and save each page as a separate PDF document.

extract-text-from-pdf-preserving-line-br.title: Extract Text from PDF Preserving Line Breaks
extract-text-from-pdf-preserving-line-br.description: Demonstrates how to extract all textual content from a PDF while keeping original line breaks and spacing using Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber and extraction options.

extract-embedded-images-from-pdf.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF with Original Format
extract-embedded-images-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF pages, locate image placements, and save each embedded image in its original format and resolution using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export its form fields to a JSON file, and optionally display the generated JSON.

populate-pdf-form-from-json-and-flatten.title: Populate PDF Form Fields from JSON and Flatten
populate-pdf-form-from-json-and-flatten.description: Loads a PDF document, imports form field values from a JSON file, flattens the form so fields become static content, and saves the resulting PDF.

print-pdf-silently-to-default-printer.title: Print PDF Silently to Default Printer
print-pdf-silently-to-default-printer.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and send it to the default printer without displaying any print dialog using PdfViewer.

print-pdf-page-range-to-network-printer.title: Print Specific PDF Page Range to Network Printer with Duplex
print-pdf-page-range-to-network-printer.description: Demonstrates how to print a selected range of PDF pages to a network printer while specifying duplex mode and paper size using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-open-action-jump-to-page-.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to Jump to Page 5
add-javascript-open-action-jump-to-page-.description: Demonstrates how to set a JavaScript open action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so that the document automatically navigates to page five when opened.

open-print-dialog-on-pdf-load.title: Open Print Dialog on PDF Load
open-print-dialog-on-pdf-load.description: Demonstrates how to set an open action that automatically shows the print dialog when a PDF is opened using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-author-metadata.title: Set PDF Author Metadata Dynamically
set-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assign the Author property to the current system user, and save the updated document.

hide-text-field-with-checkbox.title: Hide Text Field with Checkbox Using JavaScript in PDF
hide-text-field-with-checkbox.description: Demonstrates how to add a checkbox and a text box to a PDF and use JavaScript to hide or show the text field based on the checkbox state.

embed-qr-code-image-low-level-operators.title: Embed QR Code Image Using Low-Level PDF Operators
embed-qr-code-image-low-level-operators.description: Shows how to add a QR code image to a specific location on a PDF page by adding the image to page resources and inserting low‑level PDF operators (q, cm, Do, Q) with Aspose.Pdf.

create-multi-column-pdf-layout.title: Create Multi-Column PDF Layout with Aspose.Pdf
create-multi-column-pdf-layout.description: Shows how to programmatically arrange text in two columns by calculating X/Y positions and adding TextFragment objects to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

compress-pdf-images-optimization.title: Compress PDF Images Using Aspose.Pdf Optimization
compress-pdf-images-optimization.description: Demonstrates how to reduce PDF file size by compressing and resizing images with Aspose.Pdf's OptimizationOptions and saving the optimized document.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-2b.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-2b Compliance
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-2b.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/A‑2b archival format with Aspose.Pdf, and saving the compliant file.

add-xmp-metadata-pdfa-compliance.title: Add XMP Metadata for PDF/A Compliance
add-xmp-metadata-pdfa-compliance.description: Shows how to embed required XMP metadata (DocumentID, CreatorTool) and enable PDF/A settings when saving a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdfa-after-adding-zugferd-attac.title: Validate PDF/A Compliance After Adding ZUGFeRD Attachment
validate-pdfa-after-adding-zugferd-attac.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, embedding a ZUGFeRD XML file as an attachment, saving the modified document, and validating PDF/A‑2B compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.title: Convert PDF with ZUGFeRD attachment to PDF/A‑3U
convert-pdf-zugferd-to-pdfa3u.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF that contains a ZUGFeRD XML attachment, converting it to PDF/A‑3U while preserving the embedded data, and saving the result.

extract-validate-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.title: Extract and Validate ZUGFeRD XML from PDF
extract-validate-zugferd-xml-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate an embedded ZUGFeRD XML file inside a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, save it to disk, and validate the extracted XML against the official ZUGFeRD XSD schema.

generate-zugferd-xml-attach-to-pdf-invoi.title: Generate ZUGFeRD XML and Attach to PDF Invoice
generate-zugferd-xml-attach-to-pdf-invoi.description: Creates a simple ZUGFeRD XML from an order object, embeds it into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the resulting invoice document.

generate-zugferd-pdf-invoices-from-csv.title: Generate ZUGFeRD PDF Invoices from CSV
generate-zugferd-pdf-invoices-from-csv.description: Shows how to batch‑create PDF invoices, add basic text, and attach ZUGFeRD XML files by reading invoice data from a CSV source.

embed-custom-ttf-font-in-pdf-graph.title: Embed Custom TrueType Font in PDF with Graph
embed-custom-ttf-font-in-pdf-graph.description: Demonstrates how to embed a custom TrueType font in a PDF, create a vector graph, and add text using the embedded font with Aspose.Pdf.

embed-subset-custom-font-in-pdf.title: Embed and Subset a Custom Font in a PDF
embed-subset-custom-font-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a TrueType font, apply it to all text fragments in a PDF, and use low‑level font utilities to embed and subset the font, reducing the output file size.

hide-toolbar-menu-bar-pdf.title: Hide Toolbar and Menu Bar in PDF using JavaScript
hide-toolbar-menu-bar-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed JavaScript in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf to hide the toolbar and menu bar when the document is opened.

create-pdf-page-transitions.title: Create PDF with Page Transition Effects via JavaScript
create-pdf-page-transitions.description: Demonstrates adding pages to a PDF and attaching JavaScript open actions that set the page transition type and duration using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-t.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Total Field
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-t.description: Shows how to embed JavaScript in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf to sum line‑item fields and write the result into a summary field when the document is opened.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark Behind PDF Content
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent text watermark behind existing page content on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-pdf-security-allow-only-form-filli.title: Apply PDF Security to Allow Only Form Filling
apply-pdf-security-allow-only-form-filli.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with Aspose.Pdf so that only form filling is permitted while editing, printing, and content extraction are disabled.

remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF
remove-javascript-actions-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete document‑level JavaScript entries and page‑level JavaScript actions attached to link annotations, then save the cleaned file.

list-javascript-actions-in-pdf.title: List JavaScript Actions in PDF
list-javascript-actions-in-pdf.description: Shows how to enumerate both document‑level and page‑level JavaScript actions in a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert each page into a separate layer of a multi‑page TIFF file using TiffDevice.

generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.title: Generate PNG Thumbnails for PDF Pages
generate-png-thumbnails-for-pdf-pages.description: Creates PNG thumbnail images for each page of a PDF document, automatically generating a sample PDF if the source file is missing.

batch-pdf-text-extraction-indexing.title: Batch PDF Text Extraction and Indexing
batch-pdf-text-extraction-indexing.description: Extracts text from all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, builds a dictionary of file paths to extracted text, and writes the data to a searchable JSON index.

embed-audio-pdf-richmedia-js.title: Embed Audio in PDF with RichMediaAnnotation and JavaScript Playback
embed-audio-pdf-richmedia-js.description: Demonstrates how to embed an MP3 audio file into a PDF using a RichMediaAnnotation and add a JavaScript action to control playback.

encrypt-pdf-with-embedded-attachment.title: Encrypt PDF with Embedded Attachment
encrypt-pdf-with-embedded-attachment.description: Demonstrates adding an embedded file to a PDF and encrypting the document (including the attachment) with user and owner passwords using AES‑256.

set-pdf-creation-modification-dates.title: Set PDF Creation and Modification Dates
set-pdf-creation-modification-dates.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, assign the current timestamp to its creation and modification dates, and save the updated document.

draw-pie-chart-using-low-level-operators.title: Draw Pie Chart Using Low-Level PDF Operators
draw-pie-chart-using-low-level-operators.description: Demonstrates how to create a simple pie chart in a PDF by manually constructing slice paths with low-level drawing operators and filling each slice with a distinct color.

render-pdf-page-to-png-high-quality-anti.title: Render PDF Page to PNG with High‑Quality Anti‑Aliasing
render-pdf-page-to-png-high-quality-anti.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF page to a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf with custom rendering options to enable high‑quality anti‑aliasing for smoother lines and curves.

layered-transparent-rectangles-pdf.title: Create Layered Transparent Rectangles in PDF
layered-transparent-rectangles-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with overlapping semi‑transparent rectangles using Aspose.Pdf graphics, groups, and transparency settings.

add-javascript-password-prompt-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Password Prompt to PDF
add-javascript-password-prompt-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript OpenAction in a PDF that prompts the user for a password and closes the document if the password is incorrect.

create-pdf-with-signature-field-js.title: Create PDF with Signature Field and JavaScript Validation
create-pdf-with-signature-field-js.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature field to a PDF and attach a JavaScript action that runs when the field is activated, using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and export all its annotations to an XFDF file for external processing or archiving.

import-fdf-data-and-flatten-pdf-form.title: Import FDF Data and Flatten PDF Form
import-fdf-data-and-flatten-pdf-form.description: Demonstrates how to import field values from an FDF/XFDF file into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf, then flatten the form so the fields become static content.

set-pdf-document-language.title: Set PDF Document Language for Accessibility
set-pdf-document-language.description: Demonstrates how to set the primary language of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API, improving accessibility for screen readers, and then saves the updated document.

add-javascript-toggle-pdf-form-visibilit.title: Add JavaScript to Toggle PDF Form Section Visibility
add-javascript-toggle-pdf-form-visibilit.description: Demonstrates how to embed JavaScript in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf to hide a form field on open and show or hide it dynamically based on a dropdown selection.

generate-clickable-toc-pdf.title: Generate Clickable Table of Contents in PDF
generate-clickable-toc-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to auto‑tag a PDF, create a TOC element, insert a dedicated page, and copy TOC entries to outlines for clickable navigation using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-password-protection-pdfs.title: Batch Apply Password Protection to PDFs
batch-password-protection-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder with the same user and owner passwords, applying specific permissions and overwriting the originals.

dynamic-header-footer-pdf.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Header and Footer using JavaScript
dynamic-header-footer-pdf.description: Shows how to add header and footer text fields to each page and assign a JavaScript action that updates the fields with the current page number.

add-auto-close-javascript-to-pdf.title: Add Auto‑Close JavaScript to PDF
add-auto-close-javascript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, attach a JavaScript OpenAction that closes the document after a configurable timeout, and save the modified file.
